description_long: This is a stylized hammer with a short, thick, rectangular head and a cylindrical handle. The head is dark gray or black, featuring engraved designs on the sides, including a triangular knot motif and a panel with text referencing 'Thor.' The handle is wrapped in a brown, ribbed grip, likely for enhanced hold, and is capped with a metallic pommel. A black lanyard or strap is attached to the end of the handle, allowing for secure carrying or hanging. The hammer's overall appearance is reminiscent of the mythical Mjolnir, with a robust, heavy-duty construction and decorative Norse-inspired elements. The surfaces are hard and mostly matte, with some glossy highlights on the metallic parts.
description: A robust, Norse-inspired hammer with a dark, engraved head and a ribbed brown handle, featuring a lanyard and decorative motifs. The design is reminiscent of Thor's Mjolnir, with a sturdy, detailed build.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from above the head, showing the full length of the ribbed handle and the square face of the head.
description_view_1: This view highlights the engraved triangular knot motif on the side of the head and the lanyard attached to the handle's end.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the opposite side of view 0, showing the handle and the plain face of the head.
description_view_3: This view displays the engraved text referencing 'Thor' on the side of the head and the lanyard, with the ribbed handle clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with ribbed brown leather or synthetic grip, capped with a metallic pommel and featuring a black lanyard loop.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, blocky hammer head with flat striking faces, engraved Norse motifs, and a panel with text; resembles a sledge or war hammer style.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Engraved text referencing 'Thor' and Norse motifs; no commercial brand visible.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Black lanyard attached to the handle
